title: Pan-Seared Cod with Polish-Style Stir Fry
description: A simple dish that combines the flavors of Polish cuisine with the freshness of pan-seared cod. This recipe is quick and easy to prepare, making it perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Polish Sausage
ingredients.notes: Sliced Polish sausage, such as kielbasa

ingredients.name: Fry Spices
ingredients.notes: Paprika and garlic powder for added flavor

instructions: Heat the light oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Season with salt and fry spices to taste.
Add the cod fillets to the skillet, skin side up. Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the skin is crispy.
Flip the cod over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the cod with the Polish-style stir fry and enjoy!
